name: Botie Hillhouse
bio: Botie Hillhouse serves as the Henderson County Sheriff, providing law enforcement services across Henderson County from the county seat of Athens. Sheriff Hillhouse oversees a department committed to keeping the residents and lake communities of Henderson County safe.
campaignPromises: Increase lake patrol operations at Cedar Creek and other reservoirs
Expand the department's criminal investigation division
Improve radio communications coverage in remote areas
Maintain a transparent and accountable sheriff's office
Support victims of domestic violence with enhanced response protocols
